commitResults.messageBody: Make client index format consistent across health-tracking commands
Shorten set-calorie-target to set-cal and log-calorie to log-cal

commitResults.messageTitle: Help: fix multiple issues in help result display and window
commitResults.messageBody:
Help result display shows log-calorie-intake instead of log-calorie,
omits 5 working commands (find-trainers, find-clients, edit-trainer,
edit-client, delete), and retains AB3 branding in clear, exit, and
export/import descriptions.

Help window command summary text is also cut off when the window is
focused.

Let's,
* fix log-calorie-intake to log-calorie in help result display
* add missing commands to help result display command list
* replace all "Address book" references with "GymOps"
* fix command summary text cut off in help window when focused

commitResults.messageTitle: Make client index format consistent across health-tracking commands
commitResults.messageBody:
Standardise remark, set-calorie-target, log-calorie, and set-focus
to all use c/CLIENT_INDEX instead of a bare INDEX, so the command
set is predictable and easier to learn.

Changes:
- RemarkCommandParser: parse index from c/ prefix instead of preamble
- SetCalorieTargetCommandParser: parse index from c/ prefix instead of preamble
- LogCalorieIntakeCommandParser: parse index from c/ prefix instead of preamble
- Updated MESSAGE_USAGE in all four command classes
- Updated all parser tests to use new c/ format
- Updated AddressBookParserTest integration tests
- Updated HelpWindow command summary
- Updated UserGuide format lines, examples, and command summary table

commitResults.messageTitle: Shorten command names: set-calorie-target → set-cal, log-calorie → log-cal
commitResults.messageBody:
Reduces typing friction for high-frequency daily commands.
COMMAND_WORD change propagates automatically to MESSAGE_USAGE,
AddressBookParser, and all test files using the constant.

Also updated hardcoded strings in:
- HelpCommand.java
- HelpWindow.java
- UserGuide.md (TOC, headings, format lines, examples, FAQ, table)
Help: fix multiple issues in help result display and window
